name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans in Memphis offers car title loans from $100 to $50,000 with same-day funding, accepting bad credit and past bankruptcies.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a single physical branch at 1473 S Trezevant St #23 in Memphis, Tennessee, accessible under the cartitleloansla.com domain network. The lender focuses exclusively on auto title lending in the local Memphis market, providing an in-person borrowing experience with extended weekday hours.

The company offers car title loans in two tiers: smaller emergency amounts from $100 to $2,000 and larger secured loans from $2,000 to $50,000. The lending model follows a three-step process: apply online, receive cash while keeping the vehicle, and repay the loan to have the title returned. The headline offer is same-day funding for borrowers who complete their application by noon.

Swift Title Loans explicitly markets to two underserved groups: borrowers with bad credit and those with past bankruptcies. Both are accepted without apparent disqualification, lowering the typical barriers to secured lending. Business hours extend to 7pm Monday through Friday and include Saturday hours (10am–5pm), accommodating working borrowers. Staff member Alfred appears by name in multiple customer reviews, consistently described as patient, clear about loan terms, and helpful with paperwork. The office is described as welcoming and professionally maintained.

As a title lender, the core caveat is that the borrower's vehicle serves as collateral — default puts car ownership at risk. The website does not publicly disclose interest rates, APR ranges, or fee schedules, which is a material omission for any consumer comparison. Additionally, several customer reviews contain language inconsistent with title lending (phrases like 'personal loans no collateral' and 'cloud-based personal loans') that appears keyword-stuffed, raising questions about the organic authenticity of the review pool. Prospective borrowers should request full rate, fee, and repayment disclosures in writing before signing.
pros: Explicitly accepts bad credit borrowers with no apparent minimum score requirement
Past bankruptcies welcome — removes a common hard disqualifier at other lenders
Same-day cash available if application submitted by noon
Wide loan range ($100–$50,000) covers both small emergencies and larger secured needs
Borrower keeps the vehicle during the repayment period
Extended weekday hours until 7pm and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
256-bit SSL and TLS security on the online application
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the website
Vehicle is collateral — defaulting risks loss of the car
Exterior signage noted as unclear in multiple customer reviews, making the branch hard to locate
No mobile app or automated payment reminders (flagged by customers as a gap)
Review language includes SEO keyword stuffing inconsistent with actual product, reducing reliability of customer feedback
best_for: Car owners with poor credit who need emergency cash the same day
Borrowers with past bankruptcies who have been declined at traditional lenders
Memphis-area residents who prefer in-person guidance through the loan process
Borrowers needing larger secured amounts ($2,000–$50,000) against vehicle equity
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for Memphis-area car owners with damaged credit who need fast cash and have no access to unsecured lending — the same-day funding and bankruptcy acceptance are genuine differentiators. The main caveat is the absence of any disclosed APR or fee schedule, which makes it impossible to compare costs before applying; borrowers must request full terms in person or by phone before committing.
services: Title loans for past bankruptcy filers
Vehicle retained by borrower during repayment
Bilingual or assisted application support (Alfred noted in reviews)
